caption:
The rain tapped rhythmically against the ancient library windows, but my heart was pounding faster than the storm outside. 🌧️ As a visiting lecturer from Vienna, I love the gothic charm of this university, but today, the air felt different... charged. I was adjusting my fitted wool blazer, trying to keep my posture prim and proper for my afternoon seminar, when I caught Professor Halloway staring at me from across the aisle. His eyes dropped to the curve of my waist, then up to my face, a silent challenge in his gaze. 📚

After the class ended, the other students filed out, leaving us alone in the vast, dimly lit hall. 'Care for a walk?' he asked, his voice low and warm. We stepped out into the drizzle, sharing an umbrella. The closeness was intoxicating. As we walked along the cobblestone paths, the damp air clung to my blouse, subtly hinting at the fullness beneath without breaking the professional illusion. My skirt swished around my hips, every step a tease. We ended up by the old sculpture garden, where the shadows lengthened. He turned to me, brushing a wet strand of hair from my cheek, his thumb lingering on my jaw. 'You always look so composed,' he murmured, 'but I wonder what happens when the lesson is over.' The electricity between us was undeniable, a slow-burning heat that promised exciting adventures beyond the lecture hall. 🌹✨

#ViennaVibes #UniversityLife #ProfessorStyle #AcademicRomance #TeacherLove #StudyAbroad #ClassyAndSexy #LecturerLife #RainyDays #LoveOnCampus
